mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_member_transaction WHERE deleted = 0 AND (transaction_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR business_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR operator LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, member_id, transaction_type, amount, points, balance_after, points_after, business_no, remark, operator, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_member_transaction WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_member_transaction (member_id, transaction_type, amount, points, balance_after, points_after, business_no, remark, operator, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{points}, #{balanceAfter}, #{pointsAfter}, #{businessNo}, #{remark}, #{operator}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE clinic_member_transaction member_id = #{memberId}, transaction_type = #{transactionType}, amount = #{amount}, points = #{points}, balance_after = #{balanceAfter}, points_after = #{pointsAfter}, business_no = #{businessNo}, remark = #{remark}, operator = #{operator}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE clinic_member_transaction SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, member_id, transaction_type, amount, points, balance_after, points_after, business_no, remark, operator, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_member_transaction WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND deleted = 0
AND amount IS NOT NULL AND points IS NOT NULL AND transaction_type = 'LEVEL_CHANGE'
ORDER BY id DESC
